boundaries: Local project files and public web sources were read, but the run was not a verified full multi-agent runtime.
Competitor revenue, retention, and conversion were not independently verified.

project.name: LocalImageEditor
project.positioning: Local-first AI image diagnosis and editing app for creators.

conclusion: The project should avoid a direct feature-count fight and focus on local AI diagnosis, repair, controlled local editing, and creator-grade style recipes.

project_capabilities.strategic_value: Supports controllable editing and rollback instead of one-shot filter application.
Can become the core workflow: diagnose why a photo is weak before editing it.

competitive_matrix.local_image_editor: local AI diagnosis and controlled editing

differentiation: Lead with photo diagnosis before one-click edits.
Emphasize local processing, privacy, and creator control.
Build style recipes and batch-light workflows instead of copying template ecosystems.
market_entry_strategy: P0: sharpen positioning around local AI diagnosis and rescue.
P1: connect scoring, recommendation, one-click repair, local adjustment, and export.
P2: add lightweight batch style synchronization for small creators.

local_code.claim: Home exposes repair, stitching, inspiration, and create entry points.
The project has a multi-assessor aesthetic scoring engine.

local_docs.claim: Project map identifies Work, Panel, Edit, Actions, storage, mask, renderer, and package boundaries.

web_sources.title: Commercial retouching tool public site
web_sources.claim: The competitor positions around commercial photography AI retouching and workflow.

web_sources.title: Creator photo editor public site
web_sources.claim: The competitor positions around portrait retouching, editing, and creator workflows.

user_provided.material: User requested project analysis against mainstream image editing apps.
user_provided.claim: The report focus is project strategy and market entry.

inference.claim: The project should avoid direct feature-count competition.

unavailable_data.item: Competitor revenue, retention, paid conversion, and cohort behavior
unavailable_data.impact: Limits confidence in market share and monetization claims.

backlog_candidates.title: Build AI diagnosis to recommendation workflow
backlog_candidates.reason: This is the clearest differentiation between generic editing and the project's local AI strategy.
acceptance_criteria: A selected photo can produce diagnosis categories.
At least three recommended edit actions are shown.
User can apply one recommendation and see before-after output.
non_goals: Do not build a full social template marketplace.
Do not require cloud inference for the first version.
risk: AI scoring may not correlate with user taste without sample validation.

sequencing: Add style recipes after the core loop works.
validation_plan: Run a fixed before-after sample set.
Record score changes and visual results.
Review export quality and local processing boundaries.

risks: AI output quality still needs visual validation.
Public product naming must avoid visible competitor names.
boundaries: This sample is a golden structure example, not a claim that the full runtime is verified.
No private project data should be copied into public think-tank assets.
